allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\("article1.jpg","article2.jpg","article3.jpg","bg1.jpg","bg2.jpg","bg3.jpg"\)\) { $p = "C:\\Users\\purus\\StudioProjects\\planet_combo\\assets\\images\\web\\$f"; $i = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); "$f : $\($i.Width\) x $\($i.Height\)"; $i.Dispose\(\) }; Get-Content C:\\Users\\purus\\StudioProjects\\planet_combo\\android\\app\\src\\main\\AndroidManifest.xml | Select-String -Pattern "MAPS_API|google_maps|com.google.android.geo")
